interface.longDescription: Meticulate helps sales and go-to-market teams research companies directly in ChatGPT. Upload a company list or describe the accounts you care about, then identify companies, find similar targets, pull key business details, and answer structured research questions across accounts.
defaultPrompt: Search Meticulate for companies matching this ICP and summarize the strongest fits.
Look up a company by SFDC account ID and fetch its firmographic summary.
Find companies similar to this seed company and explain why they are good lookalikes.
